retrieved_result: Welcome to the Broken X Disk Manager homepage! \"Welcome to the Broken X Disk Manager homepage!Broken X Disk Manager (prior to version 4: Broken Cross Disk Manager) is a fast, compact and easy-to-use CD/disk catalog for Microsoft Windows. It's also well-suited for cataloging music files (e.g. MP3s and WMA) and Audio CDs. [ More information…] Excl
